ocr_findings.description: Pyramid diagram labels ('経営理念', 'ビジョン', '本社', '事業A/B/C', '企画/生産/販売', '企業戦略', '事業戦略', '機能別戦略', '経営戦略') within the figure are not extracted — replaced by image placeholder. These are structural diagram labels, not inline text.
'学習のポイント' sidebar label on mascot callout box not captured — decorative.

reviewer_notes: 3つの経営戦略 bullet list and SWOT分析 introductory paragraphs both captured well. Pyramid diagram content is lost to an image placeholder but all surrounding explanatory text is correct. No med- or high-severity issues.
